sections.paragraph:
f. constr. תְּעָלַת (from the root עָלָה, like תְּלָאָה which see, from the root לָאָה).

(1) a channel, 1Ki 18:32, a water-course, Isa 7:3 36:2 Eze 31:4. Poet. Job 38:25, מִי־פִלַּג לַשֶּׁטֶף תְּעָלָה “who hath divided channels for the rain?” i.e. who has caused the rain to flow down from all parts of heaven?

(2) a plaister, bandage, put on a wound, Jer 30:13 46:11 (compare חֶעֶלָה אֲרֻכָּה).
